executives.name: Jason Attew
executives.background: Mr. Attew is a mining industry executive with over 25 years of experience in investment banking and corporate strategy. He was previously CFO of Goldcorp Inc.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director

executives.name: Lisa Wade
executives.background: Ms. Wade is an environmental engineer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She was previously the VP, Environmental, Social and Governance at Goldcorp Inc.

executives.name: Moira Smith
executives.background: Dr. Smith has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in exploration and geology. She was previously the VP Exploration for Liberty Gold Corp. and has held senior positions with Teck Resources and Fronteer Gold.
